answer_span: WFI to call a new API called MPS and get a priority in numeric value to decide the priority of a given VCID

answer_span: Observe the behavior to be stitched targets is 1 frame slower than non-stitched targets

q: what does VTS's job profiler do?
answer_span: What JobProfileLoader does is to read profiles fill in actual values by reading from CMA's input.
WFI has two tasks, one to get dub-cards and one to get media properties for dub-cards.

q: what is the goal of source stitching?
answer_span: The goal source stitching trying to achieve is very simple, we are trying to concatenate dub-cards to mezzanine, at the end of it

q: which API will WFI receives stitched bundle from?
answer_span: When WFI receives stitched bundle (a bundle contains dub-cards) from the GetSingletonEncodingBundleDetails API, WFI will schedule a stitching workflow by constructing CMA request according to earlier section of this doc.
BLE: Bluetooth Low Energy, available in all gateways. Has attachment (persistent connection) as oppose to HALO.

q: how long in miles can HALO protocol covers?
answer_span: HALO: our own proprietary protocol, needs special hardware/chip. Wider range than BLE. Half of a mile. Small coverage. Has no attachment as oppose to BLE. Like broadcasting, send a message out and whichever gateway can accept it.

answer_span: 每個function第一個參數一定是viewer context

q: which command to run Hack on demand console?
answer_span: Hack console: run hphpd -h on On Demand console

q: what to do when building an Ent which will be used by multiple universe?
answer_span: Ent wiki: If you are building Ents that should be used by multiple universes, consider using a multiverse for those Ents. Multiverses allow Ents to be used by multiple universes while still enforcing separation.

q: Q4B accounts will store display name in which field?
answer_span: However, Q4B accounts will not be storing display names in the same field in OCEntUser->handle. It will be saved in the EntManagedMetaUser->name field.

q: what is the source of the truth to store Q4B real-names?
answer_span: The source of truth to store real-names for Q4B accounts is at EntManagedMetauser’s name field, which lives in the FB universe.
